# Vendor assets

These browser assets are vendored so the static documentation site does not
depend on a third-party CDN at runtime.

| File | Upstream | License |
|---|---|---|
| `docsify.min.js`, `vue.css`, `search.min.js`, `zoom-image.min.js` | `docsify@4` | MIT |
| `docsify-copy-code.js` | `docsify-copy-code@2.1.1` | MIT |
| `prism-*.min.js` | `prismjs@1` | MIT |

Sources were fetched from the corresponding `unpkg.com` package paths on
2026-07-22. Keep these files pinned and update them deliberately.
